title: Privacy-Preserving Data Analysis (DSC180 Capstone)
summary: Capstone research project exploring how privacy-preserving techniques affect data analysis and statistical inference.
highlights: Designed experiments evaluating the trade-off between privacy guarantees and data utility
Implemented reproducible data analysis pipelines to test privacy mechanisms
Analyzed how privacy noise affects statistical inference and modeling results
Published a public artifact site documenting methodology and findings

title: Interactive MICE Dataset Visualization
summary: Interactive D3.js visualization exploring the MICE protein expression dataset.
highlights: Built interactive D3 visualizations to explore biological protein expression data
Implemented dynamic filtering and exploratory views across experimental conditions
Created a narrative interface to guide users through dataset patterns
Deployed the visualization as a public web application

title: COGS108 Data Science Group Project
summary: Team-based data science project applying a full analytical workflow from data cleaning through statistical analysis.
highlights: Collaborated in a team to design and execute a complete data science workflow
Performed data cleaning, exploratory data analysis, and statistical hypothesis testing
Developed analytical models to evaluate research questions
Produced a reproducible notebook-based analysis and final report

title: Local-First Clinical Documentation Assistant
summary: Privacy-focused AI application that generates structured therapy documentation from typed or dictated session content using fully local models.
highlights: Built a local-first clinical documentation system that converts session notes or dictation into structured therapy documents
Developed a conversational Chainlit interface combined with custom React components for audio capture, transcript editing, autosave, and document review
Implemented local speech-to-text transcription and LLM-based document generation while keeping all processing on-device for privacy
Created structured workflow pipelines for generating progress notes, intake assessments, and treatment summaries
Built reliable DOCX template filling to produce documents aligned with real clinical forms instead of freeform AI text
Added tooling for batch note generation from structured session data to test repeatable document creation workflows

links.note: Repository is private due to sensitive clinical data
